title: galeopsis segetum
intro: Galeopsis segetum, also known as hemp nettle or hemp nettle herb, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Galeopsis segetum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis segetum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk medicine.
